ant.lesson: A 'no ad-hoc font-size' token guard must distinguish an ABSOLUTE magic number (px/rem) from an INTENTIONAL relative unit (em in @media-print ::after URL-append, which must scale to whatever link it trails). Exempt-AND-lock (whitelist the exact 2 rules + assert they live in their print ::after context), never blanket-fail on all units.

Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS/INP) are NOT measurable without Lighthouse in the build sandbox. A local perf PR can only verify format-wiring correctness (WebP/<picture>/image-set/tokens); the actual number is a deploy-time producer-read-back. Queue it as a tracked DEPLOY.md checklist item — never fake a score.

human.observation: A 'no ad-hoc value' regression test can be silently reverted by a cron generator that owns part of the HTML (wire_letter_writers.py STYLE_BLOCK). The guard must ALSO assert the generator emits the tokenized form, else the daily cron run re-introduces the magic numbers and the lock is theater.

eagle.observation: Kleiber clearing the WEB-QUALITY lens ('CLEAR TO PUSH BOTH') is NOT authorization for the irreversible PUSH — the push is a separate Jeff-gated Tier-2 action bundled with the hosting deploy. Held the push correctly; a quality-gate clearance and an irreversible-action approval are different gates.
